description: Wire each Mac to a tart-managed Linux devbox VM with transparent SSH and remote-builder integration. Sequence in: feat(devbox): nested-virt option; devbox-keygen command; ISO host-key + authorized_keys injection; Tailscale auto-auth; Determinate external-builders extension; flake.lock regen on toolkpyu; abandon tmp/vms.
title: Land devbox-on-mac plan
